subcodes.first_line: Say: O My handmaiden and leaf of My Lote-Tree! O My God and My Beloved! The hearts of Thy lovers have melted in their separation from Thee [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قولی یا امتی و ورقه سدرتی یا الهی و محبوبی قد ذابت اکباد عاشقیک فی فراقک این
subcodes.subjects: @prayers (general or uncategorized), @prayer for nearness to God, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @servitude; submission to God; repentance
